nodes.name: anomalies
nodes.description:
Stores statistically detected transaction anomalies for Telkomsel's payment platform, with primary key 'id'.
Each row represents one detected anomaly with its type, severity, affected entity, statistical z-score, and recommended action.
Answers questions about: what anomalies exist, which products or partners had spikes/drops, anomaly severity, and recommended actions.
Column 'check_type' is always 'trx_spike'. Column 'anomaly_type' values: 'spike' (sudden increase), 'drop' (sudden decrease).
Column 'severity' values: 'high', 'medium'. Column 'entity_type' is always 'system'. Column 'status' is always 'detected'.
Indonesian synonyms: anomali, ketidaknormalan, lonjakan, penurunan, deteksi, peringatan, rekomendasi.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each anomaly record; used to uniquely identify and join anomaly entries.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Date (tanggal) when the anomaly was first detected; used to filter anomalies by time period.

nodes.name: check_type
nodes.description: Type of statistical check performed; currently always 'trx_spike' (only one check type exists in data).

nodes.name: status
nodes.description: Current status of the anomaly; currently always 'detected'. Used to filter active anomalies.

nodes.name: entity_type
nodes.description: Type of entity where anomaly was detected; currently always 'system'. Used for categorization.

nodes.name: entity_id
nodes.description: Identifier of the specific entity (product, partner, channel) where anomaly occurred; used to link to other tables.

nodes.name: anomaly_type
nodes.description: Classification of anomaly direction: 'spike' (lonjakan — sudden increase) or 'drop' (penurunan — sudden decrease). Filter with WHERE anomaly_type = 'spike' or 'drop'.

nodes.name: severity
nodes.description: Business severity level: 'high' (kritis) or 'medium' (sedang). Use to prioritize anomalies.

nodes.name: total_trx
nodes.description: Total transaction count at time of anomaly detection; used to assess anomaly scale.

nodes.name: total_revenue
nodes.description: Total revenue (pendapatan) at time of anomaly; used to estimate financial impact.

nodes.name: avg_revenue
nodes.description: Average revenue per transaction at time of anomaly; used as baseline for comparison.

nodes.name: zscore
nodes.description: Statistical Z-score of the anomaly (deviasi statistik); values < -2 or > 2 indicate significant anomaly. Higher absolute value = more extreme.

nodes.name: threshold_value
nodes.description: Statistical threshold (ambang batas) used to trigger anomaly detection; compared against actual_value.

nodes.name: actual_value
nodes.description: Actual observed metric value (nilai aktual) at time of anomaly; compared against expected_value.

nodes.name: expected_value
nodes.description: Expected/baseline metric value (nilai yang diharapkan) based on historical patterns.

nodes.name: deviation_pct
nodes.description: Percentage deviation from expected value (persentase deviasi = (actual - expected) / expected * 100). Negative = below expectation.

nodes.name: description
nodes.description: Human-readable description (deskripsi) of the anomaly; shown directly in the dashboard.

nodes.name: recommended_action
nodes.description: Recommended corrective action (tindakan yang disarankan) for the anomaly.

nodes.name: impact_estimate
nodes.description: Estimated financial impact in Rupiah (estimasi dampak finansial); used to prioritize response.

nodes.name: payment_provider
nodes.description: Payment provider associated with the anomaly; values: 'gopay', 'ovo', 'dana', 'shopeepay', 'qris', 'linkaja_app', 'linkaja_wco', 'tsel_wallet', 'indomaret', 'finnet_cc', 'finnet_va'.

nodes.name: partner
nodes.description: Partner name associated with the anomaly; values: 'gopay', 'ovo', 'dana', 'shopeepay', 'qris', 'linkaja', 'linkajawco', 'linkaja_wco', 'telkomsel_wallet', 'indomaret', 'finnet'.

nodes.name: product_name
nodes.description: Name of the product (nama produk) associated with the anomaly; used to filter and join with product_summary.

nodes.name: service_code
nodes.description: Internal service code (kode layanan internal) for the affected service.

nodes.name: first_detected
nodes.description: Date when anomaly was first detected (pertama terdeteksi); useful for duration analysis.

nodes.name: last_detected
nodes.description: Date when anomaly was last detected (terakhir terdeteksi); used with first_detected to compute anomaly duration.

nodes.name: frequency_days
nodes.description: Number of days the anomaly recurred (frekuensi hari); higher value means persistent anomaly.

nodes.name: daily_unique_users
nodes.description:
Stores daily user counts for the entire Telkomsel payment platform. One row per day.
Column 'unique_users' = cumulative total registered users (scale: millions, e.g. 8,993,727).
Column 'daily_unique_users' = daily active users for that specific day (scale: hundreds of thousands, e.g. 856,451).
These two columns have very different scales and must not be confused.
Answers questions about: total registered users, daily active users, growth trends.
Indonesian synonyms: pengguna harian, pengguna unik, pengguna aktif, pengguna terdaftar.
JOIN: date column links to daily_master.date, daily_user_partner.date.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK); used to identify each daily user count record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Date (tanggal) for this user count record; used to filter or group by date.

nodes.name: unique_users
nodes.description: CUMULATIVE total registered users on the platform (pengguna terdaftar kumulatif). Scale: millions (e.g. 8,993,727). Do NOT confuse with daily_unique_users.

nodes.name: daily_unique_users
nodes.description: DAILY active users for this specific day (pengguna aktif harian). Scale: hundreds of thousands (e.g. 856,451). This is the correct column for 'berapa pengguna hari ini' queries.

nodes.name: financial_internal
nodes.description:
Stores internal financial settlement data per payment provider per day for Telkomsel's platform. One row = one provider × transaction_type × item_type per day.
Primary key: 'id'. Key metrics: total_net_revenue (net revenue after deductions), net_gap (settlement discrepancy — negative means deficit, actual < expected), total_platform_fee, total_admin_fee.
Column 'payment_provider' values: 'dana', 'finnet_cc', 'finnet_va', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja_app', 'linkaja_wco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'tsel_wallet'.
Note: 'tsel_wallet' here = 'telkomsel_wallet' in other tables. 'finnet_cc' and 'finnet_va' are sub-variants of 'finnet'.
Column 'transaction_type' values: 'Recharge', 'Package'. Column 'item_type' values: 'recharge', 'package', 'topping'.
Answers questions about: net revenue per provider, settlement gaps, platform fees, admin fees, financial reconciliation (rekonsiliasi keuangan).
Indonesian synonyms: pendapatan bersih, selisih settlement, biaya platform, biaya admin, rekonsiliasi.
JOIN: date + payment_provider links to product_summary (use payment_provider); date links to daily_master.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each settlement record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Transaction date (tanggal transaksi); used to filter or group financial data by time period.

nodes.name: payment_provider
nodes.description: Payment provider name (nama provider pembayaran). Values: 'dana', 'finnet_cc', 'finnet_va', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja_app', 'linkaja_wco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'tsel_wallet'. Note: 'tsel_wallet' = telkomsel wallet; 'finnet_cc' and 'finnet_va' are credit-card and virtual-account variants of finnet.

nodes.name: transaction_type
nodes.description: Type of transaction (tipe transaksi). Values: 'Recharge' (pengisian pulsa), 'Package' (pembelian paket). Used to filter by transaction category.

nodes.name: item_type
nodes.description: Type of product item (tipe produk). Values: 'recharge' (pulsa), 'package' (paket data), 'topping' (layanan tambahan/VAS). Used to segment revenue by product type.

nodes.name: total_trx
nodes.description: Total number of transactions (jumlah total transaksi) for this provider/type/date combination; used for volume aggregation.

nodes.name: total_net_revenue
nodes.description: Net revenue after deductions (pendapatan bersih) in Rupiah; the primary revenue metric for financial analysis.

nodes.name: net_gap
nodes.description: Settlement gap = actual settlement minus expected amount (selisih settlement). Negative = deficit (kekurangan), positive = surplus. Key metric for reconciliation (rekonsiliasi).

nodes.name: total_platform_fee
nodes.description: Total platform/service fee charged (biaya platform) in Rupiah; deducted from gross revenue.

nodes.name: total_admin_fee
nodes.description: Total administrative fee (biaya administrasi/biaya admin) in Rupiah; deducted from gross revenue.

nodes.name: daily_master
nodes.description:
Daily transaction summary per payment partner/aggregator for Telkomsel's platform. One row = one partner per day.
Primary key: 'id'. This is the main aggregated transaction table for high-level analysis.
Column 'partner' values: 'dana', 'finnet', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja', 'linkaja_wco', 'linkajawco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'telkomsel_wallet'.
Important: 'linkajawco' and 'linkaja_wco' are the same entity (data inconsistency) — always include both when filtering linkaja_wco.
Column 'success_rate_pct': transaction success rate. Business thresholds: ALERT if < 80%, Watch if 80–85%, Normal if > 85%, Excellent if > 95%.
Column 'success_trx': number of successful transactions (stored as float). Column 'failed_trx': number of failed transactions (stored as float).
Weighted average success rate formula: SUM(success_trx) / SUM(total_trx) * 100.
Answers questions about: daily transaction volume per partner, revenue per partner, success rate per partner, unique users per partner, MoM/WoW comparisons.
Indonesian synonyms: transaksi harian, mitra, partner, volume, pendapatan, tingkat keberhasilan, pengguna unik.
JOIN: date + partner links to channel_payment and daily_user_partner; date links to hourly_pattern_daily and daily_unique_users.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each daily partner record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Transaction date (tanggal); used to filter or group by day, week, or month.

nodes.name: partner
nodes.description: Payment partner/aggregator name (nama mitra/partner). Values: 'dana', 'finnet', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja', 'linkaja_wco', 'linkajawco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'telkomsel_wallet'. IMPORTANT: 'linkajawco' and 'linkaja_wco' are the same entity — use WHERE partner IN ('linkajawco', 'linkaja_wco') to get complete linkaja_wco data.

nodes.name: total_trx
nodes.description: Total transaction count (jumlah total transaksi) for this partner on this date; primary volume metric.

nodes.name: success_trx
nodes.description: Number of successful transactions (transaksi berhasil) stored as float; used to compute weighted success rate = SUM(success_trx)/SUM(total_trx)*100.

nodes.name: failed_trx
nodes.description: Number of failed transactions (transaksi gagal) stored as float; used for failure rate analysis.

nodes.name: total_revenue
nodes.description: Total revenue (total pendapatan) in Rupiah for this partner on this date; primary revenue metric.

nodes.name: success_rate_pct
nodes.description: Pre-computed success rate percentage (tingkat keberhasilan persen). Thresholds: ALERT < 80%, Watch 80–85%, Normal > 85%, Excellent > 95%. For accurate cross-partner SR, use SUM(success_trx)/SUM(total_trx)*100 instead.

nodes.name: unique_users
nodes.description: Number of unique users (pengguna unik) who transacted with this partner on this date.

nodes.name: daily_user_partner
nodes.description:
Stores unique user counts per payment partner per day. One row = one partner per day.
Primary key: 'id'. Used for per-partner user engagement analysis.
Column 'partner' values: same as daily_master.partner — 'dana', 'finnet', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja', 'linkaja_wco', 'linkajawco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'telkomsel_wallet'.
Note: 'linkajawco' and 'linkaja_wco' are the same entity — always include both when filtering.
Answers questions about: how many unique users per partner, partner user growth, comparing user base across partners.
Indonesian synonyms: pengguna unik per mitra, pengguna harian per partner, basis pengguna.
JOIN: date + partner links to daily_master; date links to daily_unique_users.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each daily partner-user record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Date (tanggal) of the user count; used to filter or group by time period.

nodes.name: partner
nodes.description: Payment partner name (nama mitra). Values: same as daily_master.partner. IMPORTANT: 'linkajawco' and 'linkaja_wco' are the same entity — always filter with IN ('linkajawco', 'linkaja_wco') for complete data.

nodes.name: unique_users
nodes.description: Number of unique users (pengguna unik) who transacted via this partner on this date; used for per-partner user analysis and comparison.

nodes.name: hourly_pattern_daily
nodes.description:
Stores transaction patterns per hour of the day, aggregated daily. One row = one hour (0–23) per day.
Primary key: 'id'. Used for peak hour analysis and intraday patterns.
Column 'hour': integer 0–23. Business peak hours are 18–21. Business hours are 8–22. Night hours are 0–6.
Column 'success_rate_pct': hourly success rate. Alert threshold: below 80%.
Answers questions about: what hour has the most transactions, peak hours, success rate by hour, intraday transaction patterns.
Indonesian synonyms: pola jam, jam sibuk, jam puncak, transaksi per jam, pola harian.
JOIN: date links to daily_master.date, product_summary.date.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each hourly record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Date (tanggal) for this hourly pattern; used to filter by day.

nodes.name: hour
nodes.description: Hour of the day as integer 0–23 (jam, 0=midnight, 23=11pm). Business peak hours: 18–21. Business hours: 8–22. Night hours: 0–6. Use WHERE hour BETWEEN 18 AND 21 for peak hour analysis.

nodes.name: total_trx
nodes.description: Total transaction count (jumlah transaksi) during this hour; used to identify peak hours and traffic patterns.

nodes.name: success_rate_pct
nodes.description: Success rate percentage for this hour (tingkat keberhasilan per jam). Alert if below 80%. Used to detect hourly SR degradation.

nodes.name: product_summary
nodes.description:
Per-product daily transaction summary — the most granular and largest table (514,606 rows, 930 unique products).
One row = one product × payment_provider × item_type × type_of_payment per day.
Primary key: 'id'. This is the main table for product-level analysis.
Column 'item_type' values: 'recharge' (pulsa top-up), 'package' (paket data/internet), 'topping' (VAS/layanan tambahan seperti streaming, antivirus).
Column 'type_of_payment' values: 'Prepaid', 'topping'.
Column 'payment_provider' values: 'dana', 'finnet_cc', 'finnet_va', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja_app', 'linkaja_wco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'tsel_wallet'.
Note: 'tsel_wallet' = 'telkomsel_wallet' in daily_master. 'linkaja_app' and 'linkaja_wco' are linkaja variants.
Column 'settlement_gap': difference between expected and actual settlement (can be negative).
Column 'unique_buyers': distinct customers who purchased. Column 'repeat_buyers': customers who purchased more than once.
Weighted SR formula: SUM(success_trx) / SUM(total_trx) * 100.
Answers questions about: which products sell most, revenue by product, success rate per product, repeat buyers, settlement gaps per product.
Indonesian synonyms: produk, penjualan produk, transaksi produk, pendapatan produk, pembeli unik, pembeli berulang.
JOIN: product_name links to product_price_list.product_name and daily_product_channel.product_name; date links to daily_master.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each product-day record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Transaction date (tanggal); used to filter or group product performance by time period.

nodes.name: product_id
nodes.description: Internal product identifier (ID produk internal); may be NULL for unknown products. Use product_name for joining with other tables.

nodes.name: product_name
nodes.description: Product name (nama produk); key join column to product_price_list and daily_product_channel. May be NULL — NULL product_name rows represent unidentified transactions.

nodes.name: item_type
nodes.description: Product category (kategori produk). Values: 'recharge' (pengisian pulsa), 'package' (paket data/internet), 'topping' (layanan tambahan/VAS seperti streaming, antivirus). Used to segment analysis by product type.

nodes.name: type_of_payment
nodes.description: Payment type classification (tipe pembayaran). Values: 'Prepaid', 'topping'. Used to separate prepaid from add-on transactions.

nodes.name: payment_provider
nodes.description: Payment provider used for this transaction (provider pembayaran). Values: 'dana', 'finnet_cc', 'finnet_va', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja_app', 'linkaja_wco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'tsel_wallet'. Note: 'tsel_wallet' = telkomsel_wallet in daily_master.

nodes.name: total_trx
nodes.description: Total transaction count (jumlah transaksi) for this product/provider/day; primary volume metric.

nodes.name: total_revenue
nodes.description: Total revenue (pendapatan) in Rupiah for this product/provider/day.

nodes.name: success_trx
nodes.description: Successful transaction count (transaksi berhasil) stored as float; use SUM(success_trx)/SUM(total_trx)*100 for weighted SR.

nodes.name: success_rate_pct
nodes.description: Pre-computed success rate (tingkat keberhasilan) in percent. Alert < 80%, Watch 80–85%, Normal > 85%.

nodes.name: unique_buyers
nodes.description: Count of distinct buyers (pembeli unik) for this product on this day.

nodes.name: repeat_buyers
nodes.description: Count of buyers who purchased this product more than once (pembeli berulang/repeat buyer).

nodes.name: settlement_gap
nodes.description: Settlement discrepancy (selisih settlement) in Rupiah = actual - expected. Negative = underpayment/kekurangan, positive = overpayment/kelebihan.

nodes.name: daily_product_channel
nodes.description:
Daily transaction and revenue breakdown per product across 7 internal Telkomsel distribution channels. One row = one product per day.
Primary key: 'id'. This table has 248,638 rows.
The 7 channel columns represent internal Telkomsel distribution/acquisition channels (kode internal kanal distribusi Telkomsel):
  a0_trx / a0_revenue: Channel A0 transactions and revenue
  b3_trx / b3_revenue: Channel B3 transactions and revenue
  f0_trx / f0_revenue: Channel F0 transactions and revenue
  f4_trx / f4_revenue: Channel F4 transactions and revenue
  f5_trx / f5_revenue: Channel F5 transactions and revenue
  i1_trx / i1_revenue: Channel I1 transactions and revenue
  ig_trx / ig_revenue: Channel IG transactions and revenue
To get total transactions for a product: SUM(a0_trx + b3_trx + f0_trx + f4_trx + f5_trx + i1_trx + ig_trx).
To get total revenue for a product: SUM(a0_revenue + b3_revenue + f0_revenue + f4_revenue + f5_revenue + i1_revenue + ig_revenue).
Answers questions about: which channel has most transactions for a product, channel revenue contribution, per-channel product performance.
Indonesian synonyms: kanal distribusi, channel, saluran, transaksi per kanal, pendapatan per kanal.
JOIN: product_name links to product_summary.product_name and product_price_list.product_name; date links to daily_master.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each product-channel daily record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Transaction date (tanggal); used to filter product channel data by time period.

nodes.name: product_name
nodes.description: Product name (nama produk); key join column to product_summary and product_price_list.

nodes.name: a0_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel A0 (jumlah transaksi kanal A0); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: a0_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel A0 (pendapatan kanal A0) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: b3_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel B3 (jumlah transaksi kanal B3); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: b3_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel B3 (pendapatan kanal B3) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: f0_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel F0 (jumlah transaksi kanal F0); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: f0_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel F0 (pendapatan kanal F0) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: f4_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel F4 (jumlah transaksi kanal F4); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: f4_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel F4 (pendapatan kanal F4) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: f5_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel F5 (jumlah transaksi kanal F5); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: f5_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel F5 (pendapatan kanal F5) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: i1_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel I1 (jumlah transaksi kanal I1); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: i1_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel I1 (pendapatan kanal I1) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: ig_trx
nodes.description: Transaction count via Channel IG (jumlah transaksi kanal IG); internal Telkomsel distribution channel.

nodes.name: ig_revenue
nodes.description: Revenue from Channel IG (pendapatan kanal IG) in Rupiah.

nodes.name: channel_payment
nodes.description:
Daily transactions per channel × partner combination. One row = one partner × channel × purchase_mode per day.
Primary key: 'id'. This table has 7,456 rows.
Column 'channel' values: 'a0', 'b3', 'f0', 'f4', 'f5', 'i1', 'ig' (internal Telkomsel distribution channels/kode kanal distribusi internal).
Column 'partner' values: same as daily_master.partner.
Column 'purchase_mode' values: 'SELF' (user buys for themselves / beli untuk diri sendiri), 'GIFT' (user sends to another number / kirim ke nomor lain).
Note: 'linkajawco' and 'linkaja_wco' are the same entity — include both when filtering linkaja_wco.
Answers questions about: which channel-partner combo has highest transactions, SELF vs GIFT breakdown, success rate by channel, revenue by purchase mode.
Indonesian synonyms: kanal pembayaran, mode pembelian, hadiah, diri sendiri, mitra, partner, tingkat keberhasilan per kanal.
JOIN: date + partner links to daily_master; date links to hourly_pattern_daily.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each channel-partner-day record.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: Transaction date (tanggal); used to filter channel payment data by time period.

nodes.name: partner
nodes.description: Payment partner name (nama mitra). Values: 'dana', 'finnet', 'gopay', 'indomaret', 'linkaja', 'linkaja_wco', 'linkajawco', 'ovo', 'qris', 'shopeepay', 'telkomsel_wallet'. IMPORTANT: 'linkajawco' and 'linkaja_wco' are the same entity.

nodes.name: channel
nodes.description: Internal Telkomsel distribution channel code (kode kanal distribusi internal). Values: 'a0', 'b3', 'f0', 'f4', 'f5', 'i1', 'ig'. These are internal acquisition/distribution channels, not payment methods.

nodes.name: purchase_mode
nodes.description: Purchase mode (mode pembelian). Values: 'SELF' (beli untuk diri sendiri/own number), 'GIFT' (beli untuk nomor lain/gift to another number). Used to separate self-purchase from gift transactions.

nodes.name: total_trx
nodes.description: Total transaction count (jumlah transaksi) for this channel-partner-mode combination on this date.

nodes.name: total_revenue
nodes.description: Total revenue (pendapatan) in Rupiah for this channel-partner-mode combination.

nodes.name: success_rate_pct
nodes.description: Success rate percentage (tingkat keberhasilan). Alert < 80%, Watch 80–85%, Normal > 85%. Used to monitor channel health.

nodes.name: product_price_list
nodes.description:
Reference/master table for Telkomsel digital product prices. Contains 2,366 product price records.
Primary key: 'id'. This is a static reference table (not time-series).
Products include: paket internet, pulsa, streaming services (Vision+, WeTV, Viu), antivirus (Norton, Trend Micro), productivity apps (Zoom), telco add-ons, etc.
Column 'price' is the product price in Rupiah.
Answers questions about: what is the price of a product, product catalog, product names, price lookup.
Indonesian synonyms: harga produk, daftar harga, katalog produk, harga pulsa, harga paket.
JOIN: product_name and product_id link to product_summary; product_name links to daily_product_channel.

nodes.name: id
nodes.description: Auto-increment primary key (PK) for each product price record.

nodes.name: product_id
nodes.description: Internal product identifier (ID produk); links to product_summary.product_id.

nodes.name: product_name
nodes.description: Product name (nama produk); primary join key to product_summary and daily_product_channel. Use ILIKE or LOWER() for case-insensitive search.

nodes.name: price
nodes.description: Product price (harga produk) in Rupiah; used for pricing queries and revenue validation.
